title: schilleria coruscans
intro: Schilleria coruscans, also known as the wild pepper plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Piperaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Schilleria coruscans include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
